item.dc:creator: DaPopeM

item.title: Might as well give this hamster a purpose
item.dc:creator: TheGrapes

item.title: Hi, Earth
item.description:
It’s Out Now! We still can’t quite believe it’s happening, but today we’re releasing our book “Hi, Earth” into the wild. We’ve spent years drawing talking animals, suicidal icebergs and horny flowers, trying to make sense of this beautiful mess we call home.
We never set out to create something profound. Honestly, we just wanted to draw comics that made us laugh during our own late-night anxiety spirals about the state of the planet. Somehow those drawings about Timmy the terrified teenage praying mantis and aliens who can’t decide if they want to take over the planet or not, are now bound together in actual book form.
In these strange times, we’ve found that laughing at colorful pictures about the apocalypse helps us cope better than spiraling into despair. We hope maybe it might do the same for you. Sometimes sharing a nervous laugh about the things that terrify us can make them feel a little more manageable. We’re endlessly grateful to the infamous publishing house Andrews McMeel for taking a chance on our odd little collection.
If you pick up “Hi, Earth,” we hope it gives you a quiet chuckle, or if we’re really lucky, a full-on snort-laugh that makes the people around you uncomfortable. That’s really all we were aiming for. Get it via Amazon, Barnes & Noble or BAM. Or order it through your local bookstore! https://www.amazon.com/Hi-Earth-Jonathan-Kunz/dp/1524898295 With humble appreciation, Elizabeth and Jonathan
item.dc:creator: Warandpeasofficial

item.title: We will never forget this act of defiance Ukrainian soldiers caught on Snake Island trapped by Russia’s fully loaded Flagship vessel Moskva demanding surrender on the radio they stood their ground.
item.description: Later in the war Ukraine sank the Moskva with neptune missiles.
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: What Happened Today #60
item.description: ? Power grabs, digital sabotage, and righteous resistance. Trump’s team tried to quietly transfer a $500 million building to the government, crashed the Social Security portal pushing out staff support, and bragged about killing “terrorists” in strikes escalating with Iran. But just blocks from the White House, trans Americans and their allies gathered in defiant visibility—alive, unafraid, and unyielding for Trans Day of Visibility. This is what resistance looks like. Show up. Speak out. Stay loud. Subscribe free at https://govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://www.newsweek.com/universityof-minnesota-student-detained-ice-due-2053122 2. https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/elections/nonprofit-groups-democrats-sue-trump-administration-election-executive-rcna198991 3. https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/31/trump-deports-17-alleged-members-tren-de-aragua-ms-13/82738279007/ 4. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/judge-delays-ending-temporary-protected-status-for-venezuelans/ 5. https://wtop.com/government/2025/03/defense-department-to-offer-new-round-of-voluntary-resignations-retirements-there-are-few-details/ 6. https://apnews.com/article/zeldin-epa-museum-climate-change-trump-2a0581fef0c0ff706923727f4973792d 7. https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5223605-trump-pardons-jan-6-defendant-commuted-sentence/ 8. https://www.usnews.com/news/politics/articles/2025-03-31/a-doge-employee-is-put-in-charge-of-the-us-institute-of-peace-a-court-filing-alleges 9. https://www.pbs.org/newshour/politics/bondi-instructs-justice-department-to-dismiss-lawsuit-challenging-georgia-election-law 10. https://www.politico.com/news/2025/03/31/trump-admin-cuts-tens-of-millions-from-planned-parenthood-00261763 11. https://www.courthousenews.com/judge-halts-firing-of-dei-intelligence-officers/ 12. https://www.nytimes.com/2025/03/31/us/texas-house-seat.html 13. https://www.npr.org/2025/03/31/nx-s1-5334415/doge-institute-of-museum-and-library-services 14. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/world/trump-says-he-hopes-vandals-who-trashed-his-golf-course-treated-harshly/ar-AA1BZe0i 15. https://arstechnica.com/tech-policy/2025/03/doge-accesses-federal-payroll-system-and-punishes-employees-who-objected/ 16. https://finance.yahoo.com/news/social-security-website-crashes-agency-212827914.html 17. https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/world/trump-houthi-rebels-have-been-decimated-by-relentless-strikes/ar-AA1C1th4 18. https://www.wired.com/story/doge-takes-control-usip-office-building/ 19. https://www.wusa9.com/article/life/pride-matters/trans-day-of-visibility-rally-washington-dc/65-ad614a57-ee7f-4b3f-95d5-58eab843ce3c

item.title: SPICY MEME DUMP (of funny S***) #531
item.description:
1. I would watch more of THIS show
2. Even trees have to pay the bills I guess
3
4. Another reason to have a dog
5. Perfectly programmed, no bugs
6. What ANIME is this?
7. Cats vs. The World
8. Cat owners: "Why do people think we're weird" Also cat owners:
9. Shake it... um, whatever this is
10. Stayed at a cabin when this weird squirrel showed up
11. Not a bad attempt
13. I feel these two are some sort of crime duo
14. Imgur transporting their mascot
15. The only game where you can brick the AI in the face Hey Imgur friendos, I hope you enjoyed this dump. I want to share with you that when I'm not making questionable posts on Imgur, I'm actually working on comedic game of my own. It will be out on Steam in less than 3 weeks (16/04/2025)! By wishlisting, you’ll be supporting important scientific research into whether absurdity has any limits (spoiler: it doesn’t). Think of it as the existential crisis you didn't know you needed, wrapped in a wacky, fourth-wall-breaking package. Your future self is already thanking you... or possibly blaming you. Steam page: https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_Or_Youll_Delete_The_Multiverse/
item.dc:creator: TheseusGames

item.title: Take a Meme, Give a Meme
item.description:
Unless it’s a porous rock. Then your odds change dramatically.
Showed this to the boyfriend and he wasn’t sure which fandoms some of these meant. (L-R: Avengers/Marvel, Supernatural, Doctor Who, Harry Potter, Sherlock/Sherlock Holmes, Star Wars, Star Trek)
Honestly, I blame this is on the production team. Too many Dinosaurs for only one person.
Happy Transgender Day of Visibility!
My grandpa’s name is Carl. I sometimes had to stop myself from saying “Caaaarl, that kill’s people!” when he would tell stories. I miss him.
But not in the weird “Elon with a chainsaw” kind of way. In the totally wholesome ME with a chainsaw kind of way.
Me to my boyfriend when I don’t want to cook and suggest we order sushi.
I’m not much of a gamer, but I feel this in my soul.
Yes. Yes I do.
Every. Single. Time.
item.dc:creator: LaurenLikesStuff

item.title: Hamster Valhalla
item.description:
When I was a kid my hamster chewed it’s own leg off
Nessie just runs around when I let her out
And she runs into things
item.dc:creator: danat101
